title: Gather Yourselves Together
author: Philip K. Dick
card_summary: One of Dick's early mainstream (non-SF) novels, written in the early 1950s but not published until 1994. Set in post-war China, the novel follows three Americans left behind at a factory compound as the Communist government takes over. Published posthumously by Houghton Mifflin Harcourt.
